name: Baked Potato Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Shred the potatoes coarsely. Mix with the onion, parsley, pepper, and flour.
3. Shape into 4 patties and place on a nonstick baking sheet.
4. Bake for 30 minutes. If desired, place the patties under the broiler during the last few minutes for browning.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES
